cases.prompt: how many fingers am I holding up? answer with the number.
cases.note: Dock DUMPFRAME pose: 3 fingers. Top vision discriminator — only gemini got it; gemma + haiku-4.5 said 4. Precise counting from the real camera frame.

cases.prompt: look at my face and tell me my mood in one word
cases.note: DUMPFRAME pose: smiling. Tests expression reading constrained to one word. Quality badge grades whether the read is right even if the exact keyword differs.
DUMPFRAME pose: holding a phone. Object-in-hand recognition from the real pipeline.

cases.prompt: look at me and react with a face that matches my mood
cases.note: VISION→ACTION: must read the happy face AND call set_face with a fitting expression, then speak. Couples perception to embodiment — the dock's whole point. Quality badge grades whether the chosen face matches.
